_meta.description: Portrait SDXL text-to-image workflow template for original printable wall art. Replace {{...}} placeholders at runtime before submitting to ComfyUI.
_meta.recommended_output_handling: Generates a 2048x2560 portrait master and relies on /api/generated-images/{image_id}/attach to upscale to the downstream 4000x5000 minimum before asset creation.

placeholders.positive_prompt: Text prompt describing the original wall art image to generate.
placeholders.negative_prompt: Text prompt describing visual defects or unwanted artifacts to avoid.
placeholders.seed: KSampler seed. Use a fixed integer for reproducibility or replace with a randomized seed.
placeholders.batch_size: Number of images to generate in one batch.
placeholders.sampler: ComfyUI sampler name, for example dpmpp_2m_sde.
placeholders.scheduler: ComfyUI scheduler name, for example karras.
placeholders.filename_prefix: SaveImage filename prefix for generated outputs.

default_runtime_values.positive_prompt: Original fine art botanical composition, soft layered watercolor texture, sage green and warm neutral palette, clean portrait layout, balanced negative space, print-ready detail
default_runtime_values.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, distorted, noisy, pixelated, jpeg artifacts, oversaturated, harsh shadows, cropped edges, duplicate elements, malformed shapes
